text:
Created attachment 210986
maxima 5.43.1

Updato to 5.43.1.
Changelog for 5.43.1 seems to be missing. Here is the website if anyone wants to search: http://maxima.sourceforge.net/
Here is the git repository if someone wants to inspect logs:
https://sourceforge.net/p/maxima/code/ci/5.43.1/tree/

Tested successfully with poudriere on {11.3,12.1}-RELEASE {i386,amd64}.

Please try to commit this update quick as maxima is broken until it is updated. See bug #243539.
